site.name: Akkous
site.newsletterSubtext: Weekly seasonal ideas—no spam, unsubscribe anytime.

recipes.title: British Broccoli Soup
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat rapeseed oil in a large saucepan, add chopped onions, and cook until soft. 2. Add celery, leek, potato, and butter, then cover and sweat for 5 minutes. 3. Pour in hot vegetable stock and cook for 10-15 minutes. 4. Add the rest of the broccoli and cook for 5 minutes. 5. Blend until smooth, then stir in stilton cheese.
steps: Heat rapeseed oil in a large saucepan, add chopped onions, and cook until soft.
2. Add celery, leek, potato, and butter, then cover and sweat for 5 minutes.
3. Pour in hot vegetable stock and cook for 10-15 minutes.
4. Add the rest of the broccoli and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Blend until smooth, then stir in stilton cheese.
recipes.description: British Broccoli Soup (British) — easy starter recipe with 9 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 15 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Vegan Spanish Paella
recipes.instructions: 1. Roast fennel, aubergine, pepper, and courgette in the oven for 20 minutes. 2. Sauté onion in a paella pan for 8-10 minutes, then add rice, paprika, and saffron, cooking for 1 minute. 3. Add white wine, reduce by half, then stir in two-thirds of the stock and cook for 10 minutes. 4. Stir in peas, add seasoning, and mix in roasted vegetables, then cover and cook for 10 minutes.
steps: Roast fennel, aubergine, pepper, and courgette in the oven for 20 minutes.
2. Sauté onion in a paella pan for 8-10 minutes, then add rice, paprika, and saffron, cooking for 1 minute.
3. Add white wine, reduce by half, then stir in two-thirds of the stock and cook for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in peas, add seasoning, and mix in roasted vegetables, then cover and cook for 10 minutes.
recipes.description: Vegan Spanish Paella (Spanish) — easy vegan recipe with 15 ingredients and 4 steps. Ready in 36 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Grilled Aubergine
recipes.instructions: 1. Lay aubergine slices on a baking sheet, brush with oil, and grill for 15 mins. 2. Spread hummus on each slice, coat with breadcrumbs, and grill for 3 mins. 3. Toss walnuts, parsley, and cherry tomatoes in a bowl with lemon juice and olive oil.
steps: Lay aubergine slices on a baking sheet, brush with oil, and grill for 15 mins.
2. Spread hummus on each slice, coat with breadcrumbs, and grill for 3 mins.
3. Toss walnuts, parsley, and cherry tomatoes in a bowl with lemon juice and olive oil.
recipes.description: Grilled Aubergine (Turkish) — easy vegetarian recipe with 9 ingredients and 3 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: American Fruit Pastries
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 400ºF (200ºC). 2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until combined. 3. Roll out puff pastry and cut into 9 squares. 4. Cut an L shape on each square. 5. Fold the upper right corner down. 6. Fill with cream cheese and berries. 7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
steps: Preheat oven to 400ºF (200ºC).
2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until combined.
3. Roll out puff pastry and cut into 9 squares.
4. Cut an L shape on each square.
5. Fold the upper right corner down.
6. Fill with cream cheese and berries.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
recipes.description: American Fruit Pastries (American) — easy breakfast recipe with 8 ingredients and 7 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Chickpea Fajitas
recipes.instructions:
Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6 and line a baking tray with foil. Drain the chickpeas, pat dry and tip onto the prepared baking tray. Add the oil and paprika, toss to coat, then roast for 20-25 mins until browned and crisp, shaking halfway through cooking.

Meanwhile, put the tomatoes and onion in a small bowl with the vinegar and set aside to pickle. Put the avocado in another bowl and mash with a fork, leaving some larger chunks. Stir in the lime juice and season well. Mix the soured cream with the harissa and set aside until ready to serve.

Heat a griddle pan until nearly smoking. Add the tortillas , one at a time, charring each side until hot with griddle lines. 

Put everything on the table and build the fajitas : spread a little of the harissa cream over the tortilla, top with roasted chickpeas, guacamole, pickled salsa and coriander, if you like. Serve with the lime wedges for squeezing over.
steps: Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6 and line a baking tray with foil. Drain the chickpeas, pat dry and tip onto the prepared baking tray. Add the oil and paprika, toss to coat, then roast for 20-25 mins until browned and crisp, shaking halfway through cooking.

Meanwhile, put the tomatoes and onion in a small bowl with the vinegar and set aside to pickle. Put the avocado in another bowl and mash with a fork, leaving some larger chunks. Stir in the lime juice and season well. Mix the soured cream with the harissa and set aside until ready to serve.
Heat a griddle pan until nearly smoking. Add the tortillas , one at a time, charring each side until hot with griddle lines.

Put everything on the table and build the fajitas : spread a little of the harissa cream over the tortilla, top with roasted chickpeas, guacamole, pickled salsa and coriander, if you like. Serve with the lime wedges for squeezing over.
recipes.description: Chickpea Fajitas (Mexican) — easy vegetarian recipe with 13 ingredients and 4 steps. Ready in 15 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: British Creamy Tomato
recipes.instructions: 1. Fry oil, onions, celery, carrots, potatoes, and bay leaves in a casserole dish for 10-15 mins. 2. Stir in tomato purée, sugar, vinegar, chopped tomatoes, passata, and stock cubes. 3. Add 1 litre boiling water, bring to a simmer, and cook for 15 mins. 4. Purée the mixture with a stick blender until smooth. 5. Season to taste, then reheat with milk before serving.
steps: Fry oil, onions, celery, carrots, potatoes, and bay leaves in a casserole dish for 10-15 mins.
2. Stir in tomato purée, sugar, vinegar, chopped tomatoes, passata, and stock cubes.
3. Add 1 litre boiling water, bring to a simmer, and cook for 15 mins.
4. Purée the mixture with a stick blender until smooth.
5. Season to taste, then reheat with milk before serving.
recipes.description: British Creamy Tomato (British) — easy starter recipe with 13 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 20 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Vegan Banh Mi
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix 150g raw vegetables, 3 tablespoons vegan white wine vinegar, 1 tsp golden caster sugar, and 1 tsp salt. Let it pickle. 2. Heat oven to 180C. Cut a large baguette into four, slice each in half, and toast for 5 mins. 3. Spread hummus on each piece, then top four with tempeh and pickled veg.
steps: Mix 150g raw vegetables, 3 tablespoons vegan white wine vinegar, 1 tsp golden caster sugar, and 1 tsp salt. Let it pickle.
2. Heat oven to 180C. Cut a large baguette into four, slice each in half, and toast for 5 mins.
3. Spread hummus on each piece, then top four with tempeh and pickled veg.
recipes.description: Vegan Banh Mi (Vietnamese) — easy vegan recipe with 9 ingredients and 3 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Thai Pumpkin Soup
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6 and roast 1.5kg pumpkin in a tin with half the oil for 30 mins. 
   2. Cook onion, ginger, and lemongrass in the remaining oil for 8-10 mins until softened. 
   3. Stir in curry paste for 1 min, then add roasted pumpkin, coconut milk, and stock. 
   4. Simmer for 5 mins, then cool and blend until smooth. 
   5. Season with salt, pepper, lime juice, and sugar to taste, then serve with remaining coconut milk and chilli.
steps: 1. Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6 and roast 1.5kg pumpkin in a tin with half the oil for 30 mins.
2. Cook onion, ginger, and lemongrass in the remaining oil for 8-10 mins until softened.
3. Stir in curry paste for 1 min, then add roasted pumpkin, coconut milk, and stock.
4. Simmer for 5 mins, then cool and blend until smooth.
5. Season with salt, pepper, lime juice, and sugar to taste, then serve with remaining coconut milk and chilli.
recipes.description: Thai Pumpkin Soup (Thai) — easy vegetarian recipe with 11 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 32 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Indian Bread Omelette
recipes.instructions: 1. Crack 2 eggs into a bowl and whisk. 2. Add 0.5 salt and mix well. 3. Dip 2 bread slices into the egg mixture, coating both sides. 4. Cook in a pan until the bread is golden brown and the eggs are set.
steps: Crack 2 eggs into a bowl and whisk.
2. Add 0.5 salt and mix well.
3. Dip 2 bread slices into the egg mixture, coating both sides.
4. Cook in a pan until the bread is golden brown and the eggs are set.
recipes.description: Indian Bread Omelette (Indian) — easy breakfast recipe with 3 ingredients and 4 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Jamaican Curry Goat
recipes.instructions: 1. Rinse goat meat with vinegar and water. 2. Season goat meat with curry powder, all-purpose seasoning, ground ginger, allspice, onion, garlic cloves, and thyme, then marinate for at least 4 hours. 3. Brown goat meat in oil for 2-3 minutes per side in a pressure cooker. 4. Sauté onions and garlic until softened, about 4 minutes. 5. Cook goat and water in the pressure cooker for 40 minutes on high pressure. 6. Add potatoes and scotch bonnet pepper, then cook for 10-15 minutes on sauté.
steps: Rinse goat meat with vinegar and water.
2. Season goat meat with curry powder, all-purpose seasoning, ground ginger, allspice, onion, garlic cloves, and thyme, then marinate for at least 4 hours.
3. Brown goat meat in oil for 2-3 minutes per side in a pressure cooker.
4. Sauté onions and garlic until softened, about 4 minutes.
5. Cook goat and water in the pressure cooker for 40 minutes on high pressure.
6. Add potatoes and scotch bonnet pepper, then cook for 10-15 minutes on sauté.
recipes.description: Jamaican Curry Goat (Jamaican) — easy goat recipe with 14 ingredients and 6 steps. Ready in 43 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Cream Cheese Tart
recipes.instructions: 1. Make a dough from 250g flour, 125g butter, 1 egg, and a pinch of salt, then press it into a tart form and refrigerate. 2. Stir 300g cream cheese and 100ml milk until smooth, then add 3 eggs, 100g grated parmesan cheese, and season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg. 3. Prick the crust bottom with a fork, pour in the filling, and bake at 175 degrees C for 25 minutes, covering with foil after 12.5 minutes. 4. Slice 350g mini tomatoes and combine with 3tbsp olive oil, 3tbsp white vinegar, 1 tbsp honey, salt, and pepper in a pan. 5. Place the tomato slices on the tart, avoiding excess liquid, and decorate with basil leaves.
steps: Make a dough from 250g flour, 125g butter, 1 egg, and a pinch of salt, then press it into a tart form and refrigerate.
2. Stir 300g cream cheese and 100ml milk until smooth, then add 3 eggs, 100g grated parmesan cheese, and season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Prick the crust bottom with a fork, pour in the filling, and bake at 175 degrees C for 25 minutes, covering with foil after 12.5 minutes.
4. Slice 350g mini tomatoes and combine with 3tbsp olive oil, 3tbsp white vinegar, 1 tbsp honey, salt, and pepper in a pan.
5. Place the tomato slices on the tart, avoiding excess liquid, and decorate with basil leaves.
recipes.description: Cream Cheese Tart (American) — easy starter recipe with 12 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 20 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Fasoliyyeh Bi Z-Zayt
recipes.instructions: 1. Place green beans in a large pot and drizzle with olive oil. 2. Season with salt to taste and cover the pot. 3. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until beans are cooked to desired doneness. 4. Add cilantro and garlic, and cook until cilantro starts to wilt.
steps: Place green beans in a large pot and drizzle with olive oil.
2. Season with salt to taste and cover the pot.
3. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until beans are cooked to desired doneness.
4. Add cilantro and garlic, and cook until cilantro starts to wilt.
recipes.description: Fasoliyyeh Bi Z-Zayt (Syrian) — easy vegan recipe with 5 ingredients and 4 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Syrian Falafel Sandwich
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). 2. Place falafel on a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes. 3. Whisk tahini, water, lemon juice, garlic, and paprika together. 4. Cut pita bread to form a pocket. 5. Fill each pita with 2 falafel, lettuce, tomato, cucumber, pickle, and red onion. 6. Drizzle with tahini sauce and harissa.
steps: Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. Place falafel on a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes.
3. Whisk tahini, water, lemon juice, garlic, and paprika together.
4. Cut pita bread to form a pocket.
5. Fill each pita with 2 falafel, lettuce, tomato, cucumber, pickle, and red onion.
6. Drizzle with tahini sauce and harissa.
recipes.description: Syrian Falafel Sandwich (Syrian) — easy vegetarian recipe with 13 ingredients and 6 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Smoked Haddock Kedgeree
recipes.instructions: 1. Melt 50g butter in a saucepan, add 1 chopped onion, and cook for 5 minutes. 2. Stir in cardamom, turmeric, cinnamon, and bay leaves, then cook for 1 minute. 3. Add 450g basmati rice and stir to coat. 4. Pour in 1 litre chicken stock, bring to a boil, then cover and cook for 12 minutes. 5. Cook 750g smoked haddock for 4 minutes, then cool. 6. Hard-boil 3 eggs for 8 minutes. 7. Flake the fish, peel and chop the eggs, and fork them into the rice. 8. Season with salt, pepper, and parsley, then serve.
steps: Melt 50g butter in a saucepan, add 1 chopped onion, and cook for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in cardamom, turmeric, cinnamon, and bay leaves, then cook for 1 minute.
3. Add 450g basmati rice and stir to coat.
4. Pour in 1 litre chicken stock, bring to a boil, then cover and cook for 12 minutes.
5. Cook 750g smoked haddock for 4 minutes, then cool.
6. Hard-boil 3 eggs for 8 minutes.
7. Flake the fish, peel and chop the eggs, and fork them into the rice.
8. Season with salt, pepper, and parsley, then serve.
recipes.description: Smoked Haddock Kedgeree (Indian) — easy breakfast recipe with 12 ingredients and 8 steps. Ready in 20 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Kenyan Mbuzi Choma
recipes.instructions: 1. Roast goat meat over medium heat for 50 minutes, salting as you turn it. 2. Boil water and salt, then stir in cornmeal slowly. 3. Reduce heat, stir regularly, and smash lumps for 10 minutes. 4. Remove from heat and cool. 5. Form ugali into a ball with wet hands. 6. Mix tomatoes, onions, chili, and coriander for kachumbari. 7. Serve with ugali and kachumbari.
steps: Roast goat meat over medium heat for 50 minutes, salting as you turn it.
2. Boil water and salt, then stir in cornmeal slowly.
3. Reduce heat, stir regularly, and smash lumps for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and cool.
5. Form ugali into a ball with wet hands.
6. Mix tomatoes, onions, chili, and coriander for kachumbari.
7. Serve with ugali and kachumbari.
recipes.description: Kenyan Mbuzi Choma (Kenyan) — easy goat recipe with 7 ingredients and 7 steps. Ready in 42 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Spanish Gazpacho
recipes.instructions: 1. Whizz passata, red pepper, chilli, garlic, sherry vinegar, and lime juice in a blender until smooth. 2. Season to taste. 3. Serve with ice cubes.
steps: Whizz passata, red pepper, chilli, garlic, sherry vinegar, and lime juice in a blender until smooth.
2. Season to taste.
3. Serve with ice cubes.
recipes.description: Spanish Gazpacho (Spanish) — easy starter recipe with 6 ingredients and 3 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Norwegian Red Onion Pickle
recipes.instructions: 1. Peel and slice onions into half-moon pieces. 2. Brine onions with salt for an hour. 3. Simmer vinegar, water, and sugar for a couple of minutes. 4. Pack onions into jars with pepper and bay leaves. 5. Cover with warm vinegar and seal.
steps: Peel and slice onions into half-moon pieces.
2. Brine onions with salt for an hour.
3. Simmer vinegar, water, and sugar for a couple of minutes.
4. Pack onions into jars with pepper and bay leaves.
5. Cover with warm vinegar and seal.
recipes.description: Norwegian Red Onion Pickle (Norwegian) — easy vegan recipe with 6 ingredients and 5 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: French Ratatouille
recipes.instructions: 1. Cut the aubergines into 1.5cm chunks. 2. Slice the courgettes into 1.5cm slices. 3. Chop the peppers into bite-size chunks. 4. Score and peel the tomatoes, then chop the flesh. 5. Sauté the aubergines in 2 tbsp olive oil for 5 mins on each side. 6. Fry the courgettes and peppers in olive oil for 5 mins. 7. Cook the onion and garlic in the pan, then add vinegar, sugar, and tomatoes. 8. Return the vegetables to the pan and cook for 5 mins.
steps: Cut the aubergines into 1.5cm chunks.
2. Slice the courgettes into 1.5cm slices.
3. Chop the peppers into bite-size chunks.
4. Score and peel the tomatoes, then chop the flesh.
5. Sauté the aubergines in 2 tbsp olive oil for 5 mins on each side.
6. Fry the courgettes and peppers in olive oil for 5 mins.
7. Cook the onion and garlic in the pan, then add vinegar, sugar, and tomatoes.
8. Return the vegetables to the pan and cook for 5 mins.
recipes.description: French Ratatouille (French) — easy vegetarian recipe with 10 ingredients and 8 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Jamaican Cornmeal Porridge
recipes.instructions: 1. Add 2 ½ cups water and 1 can coconut milk to a 4 QT heavy bottomed pot and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. 2. Whisk 1 cup cornmeal and 1 ½ cup water in a large mixing cup until smooth. 3. Whisk in cornmeal mixture and cook for 1 minute. 4. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally. 5. Stir in vanilla extract, cinnamon, nutmeg, and all-spice 5 minutes before done. 6. Remove from heat and sweeten with condensed milk.
steps: Add 2 ½ cups water and 1 can coconut milk to a 4 QT heavy bottomed pot and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Whisk 1 cup cornmeal and 1 ½ cup water in a large mixing cup until smooth.
3. Whisk in cornmeal mixture and cook for 1 minute.
4. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in vanilla extract, cinnamon, nutmeg, and all-spice 5 minutes before done.
6. Remove from heat and sweeten with condensed milk.
recipes.description: Jamaican Cornmeal Porridge (Jamaican) — easy breakfast recipe with 8 ingredients and 6 steps. Ready in 16 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instruc…

recipes.title: Seafood Risotto
ingredients: The juice and zest of one lemon
100g tips blanched briefly in boiling water asparagus
recipes.instructions: 1. Melt 50g butter in a pan and cook 1 chopped onion until soft. 2. Add 150g rice and stir to coat. 3. Add 125ml white wine and cook until absorbed. 4. Gradually add 1 litre hot stock, stirring until absorbed. 5. Season with lemon juice, zest, and pepper. 6. Grill salmon and serve with prawns, asparagus, and Parmesan.
steps: Melt 50g butter in a pan and cook 1 chopped onion until soft.
2. Add 150g rice and stir to coat.
3. Add 125ml white wine and cook until absorbed.
4. Gradually add 1 litre hot stock, stirring until absorbed.
5. Season with lemon juice, zest, and pepper.
6. Grill salmon and serve with prawns, asparagus, and Parmesan.
recipes.description: Seafood Risotto (Italian) — easy seafood recipe with 11 ingredients and 6 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Spanish Padron Peppers
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over high heat or air-fryer to 205C for 3 mins. Fry peppers for 5 mins, stirring frequently, until blistered and wilted. 2. Transfer peppers to a serving plate, season with sea salt, and serve with dips or as part of a tapas spread.
steps: Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over high heat or air-fryer to 205C for 3 mins.
Fry peppers for 5 mins, stirring frequently, until blistered and wilted. 2.
Transfer peppers to a serving plate, season with sea salt, and serve with dips or as part of a tapas spread.
recipes.description: Spanish Padron Peppers (Spanish) — easy vegan recipe with 2 ingredients and 3 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Turkish Falafel
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a pan, fry onion and garlic for 5 mins. 2. Mash chickpeas, spices, and herbs, then mix in egg. 3. Shape into patties, fry for 3 mins each side.
steps: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a pan, fry onion and garlic for 5 mins.
2. Mash chickpeas, spices, and herbs, then mix in egg.
3. Shape into patties, fry for 3 mins each side.
recipes.description: Turkish Falafel (Turkish) — easy vegetarian recipe with 8 ingredients and 3 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Dutch Mini Pancakes
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix yeast with lukewarm milk and stir until dissolved. 2. Combine buckwheat and flour, add yeast mixture, and stir in milk for a smooth batter. 3. Add eggs, salt, and vanilla sugar, then let rise for 45 minutes. 4. Heat the poffertjespan, add butter to each hole, and fill halfway with batter. 5. Bake one side until the top dries out, then flip and bake the other side until golden brown.
steps: Mix yeast with lukewarm milk and stir until dissolved.
2. Combine buckwheat and flour, add yeast mixture, and stir in milk for a smooth batter.
3. Add eggs, salt, and vanilla sugar, then let rise for 45 minutes.
4. Heat the poffertjespan, add butter to each hole, and fill halfway with batter.
5. Bake one side until the top dries out, then flip and bake the other side until golden brown.
recipes.description: Dutch Mini Pancakes (Dutch) — easy breakfast recipe with 9 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 31 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: British Corned Beef Hash
recipes.instructions: 1. Sauté the onions in butter on medium heat until translucent. 2. Add potatoes and corned beef, spreading evenly and increasing heat to high. 3. Cook until browned, then flip sections with a spatula. 4. Continue cooking until nicely browned, adding butter if needed. 5. Remove from heat, stir in parsley, and season with salt and pepper.
steps: Sauté the onions in butter on medium heat until translucent.
2. Add potatoes and corned beef, spreading evenly and increasing heat to high.
3. Cook until browned, then flip sections with a spatula.
4. Continue cooking until nicely browned, adding butter if needed.
5. Remove from heat, stir in parsley, and season with salt and pepper.
recipes.description: British Corned Beef Hash (British) — easy beef recipe with 7 ingredients and 5 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Syrian Baked Spaghetti
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). 2. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. 3. Add spaghetti and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until al dente. 4. Drain and stir in tomato sauce, tomato puree, cinnamon, oil, salt, and pepper. 5. Transfer to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish. 6. Bake in preheated oven for 1 hour, or until top is crunchy.
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil.
3. Add spaghetti and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until al dente.
4. Drain and stir in tomato sauce, tomato puree, cinnamon, oil, salt, and pepper.
5. Transfer to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
6. Bake in preheated oven for 1 hour, or until top is crunchy.
recipes.description: Syrian Baked Spaghetti (Syrian) — easy pasta recipe with 7 ingredients and 6 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Grilled Eggplant Omelet
recipes.instructions: 1. Grill the eggplant until the skin turns black. 2. Let it cool, then peel off the skin. 3. Crack eggs into a bowl and beat with salt. 4. Flatten the eggplant and dip in the egg mixture. 5. Heat oil in a pan and fry the eggplant until both sides are cooked.
steps: Grill the eggplant until the skin turns black.
2. Let it cool, then peel off the skin.
3. Crack eggs into a bowl and beat with salt.
4. Flatten the eggplant and dip in the egg mixture.
5. Heat oil in a pan and fry the eggplant until both sides are cooked.
recipes.description: Grilled Eggplant Omelet (Filipino) — easy vegetarian recipe with 4 ingredients and 5 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Sherry Torrijas Breakfast
recipes.instructions: 1. Beat eggs with cream, milk, sugar, and sherry, then soak bread slices for 10 minutes.,2. Fry bread in olive oil until dark golden and crisp.,3. Serve torrijas warm, dust with icing sugar, and offer crème fraîche on the side.
steps: Beat eggs with cream, milk, sugar, and sherry, then soak bread slices for 10 minutes.,2.
Fry bread in olive oil until dark golden and crisp.,3.
Serve torrijas warm, dust with icing sugar, and offer crème fraîche on the side.
recipes.description: Sherry Torrijas Breakfast (Spanish) — easy breakfast recipe with 9 ingredients and 3 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructi…

recipes.title: Delicious Beef Rendang
recipes.instructions: 1. Chop spice paste ingredients and blend until fine.,2. Heat oil in a stew pot, add spice paste and stir-fry until aromatic.,3. Add beef, coconut milk, and tamarind juice, then simmer until the meat is almost cooked.
steps: Chop spice paste ingredients and blend until fine.,2.
Heat oil in a stew pot, add spice paste and stir-fry until aromatic.,3.
Add beef, coconut milk, and tamarind juice, then simmer until the meat is almost cooked.
recipes.description: Delicious Beef Rendang (Malaysian) — easy beef recipe with 12 ingredients and 3 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Hearty Chicken Mushroom Hotpot
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6.,2. Cook onion and mushrooms in butter over medium heat.,3. Stir in flour to make a roux, then add stock or water and seasonings.,4. Bring sauce to a boil, then reduce heat and add cooked chicken and vegetables.,5. Top with potatoes and brush with melted butter, baking until golden brown.
steps: Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6.,2.
Cook onion and mushrooms in butter over medium heat.,3.
Stir in flour to make a roux, then add stock or water and seasonings.,4.
Bring sauce to a boil, then reduce heat and add cooked chicken and vegetables.,5.
Top with potatoes and brush with melted butter, baking until golden brown.
recipes.description: Hearty Chicken Mushroom Hotpot (British) — easy chicken recipe with 11 ingredients and 5 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Hearty Dutch Stamppot
recipes.instructions:
1. Wash and peel potatoes, cutting into similar sized pieces. 
2. Boil potatoes and bay leaves in salted water for 20 minutes, then discard bay leaves. 
3. Wash and chop curly kale, sauteing in butter until tender. 
4. Warm milk and mash cooked potatoes with remaining butter and milk. 
5. Mix cooked kale through mashed potatoes and top with smoked sausage
steps: 1. Wash and peel potatoes, cutting into similar sized pieces.
2. Boil potatoes and bay leaves in salted water for 20 minutes, then discard bay leaves.
3. Wash and chop curly kale, sauteing in butter until tender.
4. Warm milk and mash cooked potatoes with remaining butter and milk.
5. Mix cooked kale through mashed potatoes and top with smoked sausage
recipes.description: Hearty Dutch Stamppot (Dutch) — easy pork recipe with 10 ingredients and 5 steps. Ready in 10 min. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Smoked Salmon Eggs Benedict
recipes.instructions: 1. Make the Hollandaise sauce by whisking egg yolks with lemon juice and vinegar. 2. Poach eggs in simmering water with vinegar. 3. Toast and butter English muffins, then top with smoked salmon, eggs, and Hollandaise sauce.
steps: Make the Hollandaise sauce by whisking egg yolks with lemon juice and vinegar.
2. Poach eggs in simmering water with vinegar.
3. Toast and butter English muffins, then top with smoked salmon, eggs, and Hollandaise sauce.
recipes.description: Smoked Salmon Eggs Benedict (American) — easy breakfast recipe with 9 ingredients and 3 steps. Includes exact ingredients and clear instructions.

recipes.title: Hearty Croatian Beef Stew
recipes.instructions: 1. Cut beef into 3x3 cm pieces and marinate in mustard and spices for 1 hour.,2. Fry the meat in oil until browned, then set aside.,3. Cook onions and carrots over low heat for 15 minutes.,4. Add meat, bay leaves, garlic, and wine, simmering for 10-15 minutes.,5. Add liquid, cover, and cook over low heat for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.,6. Add remaining water and cook for 30-45 minutes.
steps: Cut beef into 3x3 cm pieces and marinate in mustard and spices for 1 hour.,2.
Fry the meat in oil until browned, then set aside.,3.
Cook onions and carrots over low heat for 15 minutes.,4.
Add meat, bay leaves, garlic, and wine, simmering for 10-15 minutes.,5.
Add liquid, cover, and cook over low heat for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.,6.
Add remaining water and cook for 30-45 minutes.

recipes.title: Chicken Enchilada Bake
recipes.instructions: 1. Cook chicken in Enchilada sauce on low heat for 20 minutes. 2. Shred the chicken with two forks. 3. Preheat oven to 375 F degrees. 4. Layer tortillas, chicken, sauce, and cheese in a baking dish. 5. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes uncovered.

recipes.title: Pistachio Raspberry Cake
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 180C/160C fan/gas 4 and prepare a 23cm springform cake tin.,2. Mix the ground pistachios, flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.,3. Beat the butter and sugar until fluffy, then add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.

recipes.title: Norwegian Beef Patties with Caramelized Onions
recipes.instructions: 1. Grate half an onion and set aside.,2. Slice the rest of the onions and fry in butter on low/medium heat until caramelized.,3. Mix together ground beef, grated onion, salt, pepper, nutmeg, cornstarch, and water in a bowl.,4. Form into a sausage and cut 6 patties, making a light grid pattern in each patty.,5. Brown both sides of the patties in butter on high heat, then turn down to low heat and fry for another 2 – 3 minutes.

recipes.title: Jamaican Beef Patties Recipe
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix flour, salt, and curry powder in a large bowl.,2. Rub in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.,3. Add water and mix to form a dough.,4. Divide the dough into 10-12 pieces and roll out each piece into a circle.,5. Place 3 tablespoons of beef filling on one half of the circle.,6. Fold the other half over and press to seal.,7. Brush with egg wash and bake at 350 F for 30 minutes.

recipes.title: Chicken Stir Fry
recipes.instructions: 1. Coat chicken with egg white and cornstarch. 2. Whisk together pineapple juice, vinegar, and ketchup. 3. Stir-fry chicken over high heat, then add peppers and pineapple.

recipes.title: Classic Battenberg Cake
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 180C/160C fan/gas 4 and line a 20cm square tin with baking parchment.,2. Make the almond sponge by beating together butter, sugar, flour, ground almonds, baking powder, eggs, vanilla and almond extract.,3. Scrape the mix into the tin and bake for 25-30 mins, then cool in the tin for 10 mins.,4. Repeat steps 1-3 for the pink sponge, omitting almond extract and adding pink food colouring.,5. Assemble the cake by trimming the sponges, rolling out marzipan, and brushing with apricot jam.

recipes.title: Braised Lamb Shoulder with Beans
recipes.instructions: 1. Combine spice mix and rub into lamb shoulder. 2. Sear lamb and cook vegetables in oil, then roast in oven. 3. Add beans, peppers, and olives, and cook until lamb is tender.

recipes.title: Refreshing Sesame Cucumber Salad
recipes.instructions: 1. Peel and cut cucumbers into quarters. 2. Remove seeds if bitter. 3. Cut into 1/2-inch pieces. 4. Toss with sesame oil, rice vinegar, salt, basil, and chili flakes. 5. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

recipes.title: Hearty Canadian Jiggs Dinner
recipes.instructions: 1. Soak salt beef and split peas in water overnight.,2. Boil the salt beef and peas for 2 hours.,3. Remove the peas and mix with butter and pepper.,4. Add cabbage, turnip, carrots, and potatoes, boiling until tender.,5. Serve the meal with the cooking liquid as a pot liquor or reduced jus.

recipes.title: Thai Coconut Chicken Soup
recipes.instructions: 1. Combine chicken stock, coconut milk, galangal, lemongrass, and lime leaves, and simmer for 6-8 minutes. 2. Add chicken and cook until tender, then add mushrooms and chillies, and simmer for 3-5 minutes. 3. Remove aromatics and serve with coriander and steamed rice

recipes.title: Polish Pancakes Recipe
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix flour, eggs, milk, water, and salt in a bowl. 2. Add butter or oil and mix well. 3. Heat a non-stick pan and pour in the batter, swirling to spread. 4. Flip when the pancake pulls away from the sides and cook briefly on the other side.

recipes.title: Lamb Biryani Recipe
ingredients: ½ tsp dissolved in ½ cup warm milk Saffron
recipes.instructions: Grind cashew, poppy seeds and cumin seeds into a smooth paste.,Deep fry sliced onions and cashewnuts until golden brown.,Wash and soak basmati rice for twenty minutes.,Cook lamb with spices and yogurt in a big pan.,Boil rice with salt and jeera, then drain.,Layer lamb, rice, and garnishes in a big pan.,Cover and bake in oven or cook on stove.

recipes.title: Tunisian Chakchouka Recipe
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium high heat. 2. Add the onion and sauté for 2-3 minutes. 3. Add the peppers and garlic, and sauté for an additional 3-5 minutes. 4. Add the tomatoes, cumin, paprika, salt, and chili powder, and simmer for 10-15 minutes. 5. Make four craters in the mixture and crack one egg into each. 6. Cover the skillet and simmer for 5-7 minutes, until the eggs have set.

recipes.title: Classic Beef Wellington
recipes.instructions: 1. Process mushrooms into a rough paste and cook out moisture.,2. Sear beef fillet and brush with mustard.,3. Assemble beef, mushroom paste, and Parma ham, then chill.,4. Roll out puff pastry and wrap around beef, brushing with egg yolk.,5. Score pastry, glaze, and bake at 200C for 20 minutes, then 180C for 15 minutes.

recipes.title: Thai Chicken Soup
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pan, add onion and fry for 3 minutes to soften.,2. Add chicken, garlic, curry paste, coconut milk, stock, lime leaves, and fish sauce, then simmer for 12 minutes.,3. Add green beans, bamboo shoots, and cook until beans are tender.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato Jamaican Pudding
recipes.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease and line a 9-inch round pan or loaf pan with parchment paper. 3. Process sweet potatoes in a food processor until finely grated. 4. Combine grated sweet potatoes, sugar, flour, and spices in a large bowl. 5. Stir in coconut milk and fold in raisins. 6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 1 hour 30 minutes
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and line a 9-inch round pan or loaf pan with parchment paper.
3. Process sweet potatoes in a food processor until finely grated.
4. Combine grated sweet potatoes, sugar, flour, and spices in a large bowl.
5. Stir in coconut milk and fold in raisins.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 1 hour 30 minutes

recipes.title: Hearty Lamb Plov
recipes.instructions: 1. Soak prunes in water and lemon juice for 1 hour, then chop.,2. Cook onion and lamb in butter for 5 minutes.,3. Add stock, rice, and saffron, then simmer for 15 minutes.

recipes.title: Hearty Syrian Rice
recipes.instructions: 1. Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.,2. Add ground beef and season with salt, allspice, cinnamon, and black pepper.,3. Cook and stir until beef is browned and crumbly, 7 to 10 minutes.,4. Stir chicken broth and rice into beef; bring to a boil.,5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes.,6. Melt butter in a small skillet over medium heat and cook pine nuts until lightly browned.
